name: Chronotyper

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# 🎛️ Selective Property Control

> You can see that the version goes from `0.2.0` to `2.1.0` and that is because I had Copilot follow do this release 👍

![Obsidian Downloads](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?label=version%20downloads&query=%24%5B%22chronotyper%22%5D%5B%222.1.0%22%5D&url=https%3A%2F%2Fraw.githubusercontent.com%2Fobsidianmd%2Fobsidian-releases%2Fmaster%2Fcommunity-plugin-stats.json&logo=obsidian&color=8b6cef&logoColor=8b6cef&labelColor=f1f2f3&logoWidth=15&style=flat-square)

Toggle individual frontmatter properties on/off! 

Now you can independently disable either the "updated timestamp" or "edit time tracking" properties while keeping the other active. Perfect for users who only want partial time tracking or need to customize their workflow without completely disabling the plugin.

Key features:
- ✅ Toggle switches for each property type in settings
- ✅ Maintains backward compatibility (both enabled by default) 
- ✅ Input fields automatically disable when toggled off
- ✅ Granular control over what gets tracked in your notes

This gives users much more flexibility in how they want Chronotyper to interact with their vault!
Closes #2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Exclusion Filters

![Obsidian Downloads](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?label=version%20downloads&query=%24%5B%22chronotyper%22%5D%5B%220.2.0%22%5D&url=https%3A%2F%2Fraw.githubusercontent.com%2Fobsidianmd%2Fobsidian-releases%2Fmaster%2Fcommunity-plugin-stats.json&logo=obsidian&color=8b6cef&logoColor=8b6cef&labelColor=f1f2f3&logoWidth=15&style=flat-square)

This release introduces **directory exclusion** and **customizable frontmatter property names**!

- Added ability to exclude directories from time tracking (resolves #1)
  - New settings UI to add/remove exclusions
  - Files in excluded directories are completely ignored by the plugin

- Added customizable property names for frontmatter
  - Set your own property names for last updated timestamp
  - Set your own property name for total edit time
  - Default values preserved for backward compatibility
